name: tracksure-validation
description: Code validation scripts for TrackSure WordPress plugin

scripts.phpcs:clean: npm run fix:comments && npm run fix:unslash && npm run fix:error-log && npm run phpcs:fix
scripts.phpcs:perfect: npm run phpcs:clean && npm run fix:line-length && npm run fix:file-comments && npm run fix:throws && npm run phpcs:fix
scripts.security:check: npm run security:php && npm run security:js
scripts.security:js: echo 'Running JS security scan...' && eslint admin/src --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx --no-eslintrc --plugin security --rule 'security/detect-object-injection: error'
scripts.validate: npm run phpcs && npm run eslint && npm run stylelint
scripts.validate:fix: npm run phpcs:fix && npm run eslint:fix && npm run stylelint:fix
scripts.prepare:release: npm run validate && npm test && npm run build:production && npm run zip:plugin
scripts.build:production: cd admin && npm install && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:ci: npm ci && cd admin && npm ci && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.test: echo 'Running tests...' && phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml || echo 'No tests configured yet'
